channel.title: TTC Service Alerts
channel.description: Live service alerts for the Toronto Transit Commission

item.title: 🚇 Line 1 Yonge-University: There will be no subway service between St Clair West and King stations, starting 11:59 p.m., nightly Monday, March 16 to Thursday, March 19, due to planned track work. Shuttle buses will operate.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: There will be no subway service between St Clair West and King stations, starting 11:59 p.m., nightly Monday, March 16 to Thursday, March 19, due to planned track work. Shuttle buses will operate.

item.title: 🚌 40 Junction-Dundas West: Detour eastbound via Keele St, Annette St and Pacific Ave due to a collision.
item.description: 40 Junction-Dundas West: Detour eastbound via Keele St, Annette St and Pacific Ave due to a collision.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Eglinton to Davisville stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Eglinton to Davisville stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Dupont to St Clair West stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Dupont to St Clair West stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Wilson to Sheppard West stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Wilson to Sheppard West stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Wilson to Yorkdale stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from Wilson to Yorkdale stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from St Clair West to Dupont stations while we work on switch issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual southbound from St Clair West to Dupont stations while we work on switch issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from TMU to College stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from TMU to College stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Bloor-Yonge to Rosedale stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 1 Yonge-University: Subway trains will move slower than usual northbound from Bloor-Yonge to Rosedale stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual westbound from Greenwood to Donlands stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual westbound from Greenwood to Donlands stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Kipling to Islington stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Kipling to Islington stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Keele to Dundas West stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Keele to Dundas West stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Sherbourne to Castle Frank stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Sherbourne to Castle Frank stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: 🐢 Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Donlands to Greenwood stations while we work on track issues.
item.description: Line 2 Bloor-Danforth: Subway trains will move slower than usual eastbound from Donlands to Greenwood stations while we work on track issues.

item.title: ♿ Wilson: Elevator 8S2L out of service between street and concourse while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.
item.description: Wilson: Elevator 8S2L out of service between street and concourse while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.

item.title: ♿ York Mills: Elevator 20Y2L out of service between concourse and bus platform while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.
item.description: York Mills: Elevator 20Y2L out of service between concourse and bus platform while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Main Street: Elevator 13D2L out of service between concourse and Line 2 westbound platform while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.
item.description: Main Street: Elevator 13D2L out of service between concourse and Line 2 westbound platform while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Dundas West: Elevator 8B2L out of service between concourse and Line 2 westbound platform while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.
item.description: Dundas West: Elevator 8B2L out of service between concourse and Line 2 westbound platform while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Eglinton: Elevator 18Y1L out of service between Yonge St west side entrance and Line 1 centre platform due to construction.
item.description: Eglinton: Elevator 18Y1L out of service between Yonge St west side entrance and Line 1 centre platform due to construction.

item.title: ♿ Runnymede: Escalator 11B2E out of service from concourse to Runnymede Rd entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.
item.description: Runnymede: Escalator 11B2E out of service from concourse to Runnymede Rd entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Queen's Park: Elevator 3Y2L out of service between concourse and Line 1 centre platform while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 27, 2026.
item.description: Queen's Park: Elevator 3Y2L out of service between concourse and Line 1 centre platform while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 27, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Spadina: Elevator 2B2L out of service between south concourse and Line 2 westbound platform due to a technical problem.
item.description: Spadina: Elevator 2B2L out of service between south concourse and Line 2 westbound platform due to a technical problem.

item.title: ♿ Queen's Park: Elevator 2 out of service between Eglinton Avenue north side, west entrance and concourse due to a technical problem.
item.description: Queen's Park: Elevator 2 out of service between Eglinton Avenue north side, west entrance and concourse due to a technical problem.

item.title: ♿ North York Centre: Escalator 23Y3E out of service from Line 1 Vaughan via Union platform to concourse due to a technical problem. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 20, 2026.
item.description: North York Centre: Escalator 23Y3E out of service from Line 1 Vaughan via Union platform to concourse due to a technical problem. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 20, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Downsview Park: Escalator 10S5E out of service from GO entrance to concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 20, 2026.
item.description: Downsview Park: Escalator 10S5E out of service from GO entrance to concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 20, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Cedarvale: Elevator out of service between upper concourse, lower concourse, Line 1 southbound, and Line 5 centre platform while the maintainer performs maintenance.
item.description: Cedarvale: Elevator out of service between upper concourse, lower concourse, Line 1 southbound, and Line 5 centre platform while the maintainer performs maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Pioneer Village: Escalator 13S1E out of service from north concourse to Steeles Ave W north side entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.
item.description: Pioneer Village: Escalator 13S1E out of service from north concourse to Steeles Ave W north side entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 19, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Yorkdale: Escalator 7S4E out of service from Line 1 Centre platform to Yorkdale Service Rd entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 20, 2026.
item.description: Yorkdale: Escalator 7S4E out of service from Line 1 Centre platform to Yorkdale Service Rd entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 20, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Broadview: Escalator 6D3E out of service from concourse to Broadview Ave entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 29, 2026.
item.description: Broadview: Escalator 6D3E out of service from concourse to Broadview Ave entrance while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 29, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Eglinton: Elevator 3 out of service between Line 1 centre platform and Line 5 centre platform while we perform maintenance.
item.description: Eglinton: Elevator 3 out of service between Line 1 centre platform and Line 5 centre platform while we perform maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Mount Dennis: Elevator 2 out of service between bus platform and concourse while we perform maintenance.
item.description: Mount Dennis: Elevator 2 out of service between bus platform and concourse while we perform maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Spadina: Escalator 1S5E out of service from Line 1 Finch via Union platform to south concourse due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 31, 2026.
item.description: Spadina: Escalator 1S5E out of service from Line 1 Finch via Union platform to south concourse due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 31, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Kipling: Escalator 16B1E out of service from Line 2 platform to bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service July 11, 2026.
item.description: Kipling: Escalator 16B1E out of service from Line 2 platform to bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service July 11, 2026.

item.title: ♿ St Clair: Elevator 16Y2L out of service between concourse and Line 1 northbound platform due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.
item.description: St Clair: Elevator 16Y2L out of service between concourse and Line 1 northbound platform due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Warden: Elevator 15D2L out of service between concourse and Warden Avenue entrance due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.
item.description: Warden: Elevator 15D2L out of service between concourse and Warden Avenue entrance due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Warden: Elevator 15D1L out of service between concourse and Line 2 platform due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.
item.description: Warden: Elevator 15D1L out of service between concourse and Line 2 platform due to construction. Elevator is expected to be back in service March 30, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Sheppard-Yonge: Elevator out of service between Sheppard Ave E south side entrance and Line 4 eastbound platform while we perform maintenance.
item.description: Sheppard-Yonge: Elevator out of service between Sheppard Ave E south side entrance and Line 4 eastbound platform while we perform maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Sheppard-Yonge: Elevator out of service between Yonge St east side entrance and north concourse while we perform maintenance.
item.description: Sheppard-Yonge: Elevator out of service between Yonge St east side entrance and north concourse while we perform maintenance.

item.title: ♿ Don Valley: Elevator 2 out of service between concourse and Don Mills Road east side entrance and bus terminal due to the Ontario Line construction.
item.description: Don Valley: Elevator 2 out of service between concourse and Don Mills Road east side entrance and bus terminal due to the Ontario Line construction.

item.title: ♿ Finch: Escalator 22Y11E out of service from Fares concourse to GO and YRT bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 27, 2026.
item.description: Finch: Escalator 22Y11E out of service from Fares concourse to GO and YRT bus platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 27, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Finch: Escalator 22Y10E out of service from GO and YRT bus platform to Fares concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 27, 2026.
item.description: Finch: Escalator 22Y10E out of service from GO and YRT bus platform to Fares concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 27, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Kipling: Escalator 16B2E out of service from bus platform to Line 2 platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 20, 2026.
item.description: Kipling: Escalator 16B2E out of service from bus platform to Line 2 platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 20, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Islington: Escalator 15B5E out of service from concourse to Islington Ave east side entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service December 22, 2026.
item.description: Islington: Escalator 15B5E out of service from concourse to Islington Ave east side entrance due to construction. Escalator is expected to be back in service December 22, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Museum: Escalator 2Y1E out of service from concourse to Line 1 platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 31, 2026.
item.description: Museum: Escalator 2Y1E out of service from concourse to Line 1 platform while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service March 31, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Spadina: Escalator 2B2E out of service from Line 2 Kennedy platform to south concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 6, 2026.
item.description: Spadina: Escalator 2B2E out of service from Line 2 Kennedy platform to south concourse while we perform maintenance. Escalator is expected to be back in service May 6, 2026.

item.title: ♿ Victoria Park: Elevator 14D1L out of service between overpass, Victoria Park Ave entrance and concourse while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service May 29, 2026.
item.description: Victoria Park: Elevator 14D1L out of service between overpass, Victoria Park Ave entrance and concourse while we perform maintenance. Elevator is expected to be back in service May 29, 2026.
